top_signals.title: Amazon cuts some jobs in its artificial general intelligence unit
top_signals.summary: Amazon's AGI unit has released a set of AI models, called Nova, and also includes groups working on silicon and quantum computing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Maduro Trial Date Set for June 2027 in US Drug-Trafficking Case
top_signals.summary: Nicolás Maduro appeared in court for the first time since March as a judge set a June 1, 2027, date for the ousted Venezuelan leader’s trial in a US drug-trafficking and narco-terrorism conspiracy case.

top_signals.title: GE Vernova Raises Outlook As AI Power Boom Masks Wind Weakness
top_signals.summary: GE Vernova raised its full-year revenue forecast on Wednesday after another quarter of booming demand for gas turbines, grid equipment and AI-driven electricity infrastructure. Wind was the clear exception. The company’s wind business posted deeper losses as turbine manufacturers continue to struggle with weak project economics, rising costs and politics. The company reported second-quarter revenue of $11.1 billion, up 22% year-over-year and ahead of analyst expectations, while orders surged 88% to a record $24.2 billion, lifting its backlog…

top_signals.title: European Commission Appoints Cecilia Thorfinn as Head of Representation in The Hague
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 22 Jul 2026 Today, Cecilia Thorfinn has been appointed as the new Head of the European Commission Representation in The Hague, The Netherlands.
